overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a samurai character in white armor riding a horse through a heavy snowstorm in a mountainous winter landscape. The character traverses from open snowy forests into narrow rocky passes with extremely low visibility due to blowing snow and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain trail with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: riding a white horse at a steady trot through an open snowy forest with snow-laden pine trees flanking both sides of the trail

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees heavily laden with snow lining the left side of the trail
tall evergreen trees heavily laden with snow lining the right side of the trail
distant snow-covered mountain rising in the background with low visibility

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain trail with the samurai character riding a white horse through moderate snowfall. Snow-covered pine trees line both sides of the path while distant mountain slopes fade into the foggy background. The camera follows steadily from behind as the horse maintains a consistent trot through the open woodland terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowstorm with heavy fog and blowing snow reducing visibility

events.description: heavy snowstorm intensifies causing visibility to drop significantly into whiteout conditions
character raises right hand to shield face from blowing snow and wind

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride through severe whiteout conditions, raising a hand to shield against the stinging snow while maintaining forward progress

segments.scene_description: The weather deteriorates into a heavy snowstorm with dense fog reducing visibility to near whiteout conditions. The character raises a hand to shield their face from the blowing snow while the horse continues forward. The surrounding pine trees fade into the distance, becoming barely visible silhouettes in the gray-white haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass with snow-covered rock walls

events.description: terrain narrows into a rocky mountain pass with close snow banks and rock walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating a narrow winding trail between close snow-covered rock walls and dense pine trees, maintaining careful control of the horse

entered.detail: large rocky cliff face covered in deep snow forming a close wall on the left side of the narrow passage
snow-covered rocky outcrop on the right side creating a tight corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions into a narrow mountain pass with snow-covered rock walls closing in on both sides. The character carefully guides the horse through the confined snowy corridor, passing close to snow-laden pine trees and rocky outcrops. Visibility improves slightly as the character moves through the protected passage, though snow continues to fall heavily.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain landscape that transforms from an open woodland trail into a claustrophobic, storm-swept rocky pass. It begins with the camera trailing a samurai on a white horse as they trot along a wide path lined with snow-covered pine trees under a foggy sky. As the weather deteriorates, the scene shifts into a heavy snowstorm with dense whiteout conditions, forcing the character to shield their face while the surrounding forest fades into ghostly silhouettes. The camera then follows the horse as the terrain narrows into a confined mountain corridor, where towering snow-laden rock walls close in on both sides. Finally, the movement continues through this protected passage, passing close to rocky outcrops as the heavy snowfall persists.
